expectations.text: Provides a numbered layer naming scheme specific to the user's icon (gradient background, main shape, text label)
expectations.evidence: response.md provides naming scheme though less targeted to the user's specific three layers

expectations.text: States that the gradient background should NOT be exported — it should be set directly in Icon Composer
expectations.evidence: response.md advises exporting the gradient background (discusses gradient angles/stops for export), never mentions setting it in Icon Composer instead

expectations.text: States the canvas mask (rounded rectangle) should NOT be exported
expectations.evidence: response.md mentions 'clipping masks' only in context of hidden layers, not the icon shape mask that must be omitted

expectations.text: Mentions converting the text layer to outlines before exporting (because SVG doesn't preserve fonts)
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Text is outlined to vector (Right-click → Outline Stroke, or use Flatten)'

expectations.text: Recommends SVG format for vector shapes (the main shape and text outlines)
expectations.evidence: response.md does not mention SVG at all; implies PNG export

expectations.text: Includes a structured export checklist (a list of checkboxes or enumerated steps)
expectations.evidence: response.md contains a markdown checklist with [ ] checkboxes
